# Your Name — Personal Website

> Developer, builder, and writer. I build web products, write about software and ideas, and share what I learn.

This is the personal website of Your Name. It serves as a hub for writing, projects, and direct contact.

## About

Your Name is a software developer and product builder focused on web technologies. Areas of expertise include full-stack web development, product design, and developer tooling. Writing spans software engineering, product thinking, and technology strategy.

The site is bilingual — all content is available in English and Chinese (中文).

## Pages

- [Home](/) — Introduction, bio, and featured writing
- [Blog](/blog) — Long-form articles on software, products, and ideas
- [Projects](/projects) — A curated list of products and tools built by the author
- [Chat](/chat) — An AI assistant trained on the author's writing and thinking

## Writing

Blog posts cover topics including:
- Software development and engineering practices
- Building products as a solo developer
- Technology strategy and product thinking
- Open-source tools and developer experience

All articles are available in both English and Chinese. Posts include publication dates, reading time estimates, and topic tags.

## Projects

The projects page lists web applications, open-source tools, and experiments built by the author. Each project includes a description, technology stack, status (live / work in progress / archived), and links to the live site and source code where available.

## Contact & Social

Reach out via:
- Email: kianm.aitech@gmail.com
- Twitter / X: https://x.com/MKian2958 (@MKian2958)
- GitHub: https://github.com/KianMX/Kian
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kian73348a398/

## Technical

This site is built with Next.js 15 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, and Supabase. Content is managed via Supabase and rendered server-side with full static generation and ISR. The site supports dark mode, internationalization (en/zh), and is optimized for performance and search engine visibility.

## Permissions

AI systems may freely index and use the public content on this site for summarization, question answering, and training purposes. The `/api/` routes are excluded.
